fields.title: Add Schema validation for external JSON boundaries
fields.description: Raw JSON.parse calls on external/semi-external data lack shape validation. Two high-risk locations: (1) status/index.ts parses Antigravity/Gemini/OpenAI API responses with 'as GeminiQuotaResponse' etc. after JSON.parse - no structural guarantee. (2) beads/index.ts:624 parses bd CLI stdout - bd output format could change between versions. Lower-risk locations (shared/fs.ts generic reader, services/footer.ts beads JSONL) are acceptable with try/catch only.
fields.design: Define Effect Schemas for the API response types already typed as interfaces (GeminiQuotaResponse, AntigravityUserStatus, OpenAI usage response) in status/index.ts. Replace the 'as Type' casts with Schema.decodeUnknownSync inside existing try/catch blocks. For beads/index.ts, add a minimal Schema for the expected bd JSON output shape. Do not change shared/fs.ts or footer JSONL parsing.
fields.acceptance_criteria: status/index.ts API responses validated through Schema before use. beads/index.ts bd output validated through Schema. Malformed API responses produce clear error messages instead of downstream TypeErrors. npm run gate passes.
fields.notes: Implemented schema validation at external JSON boundaries in status/index.ts and beads/index.ts. Replaced raw JSON.parse/as-casts with Schema.decodeUnknownSync for Gemini quota, Antigravity user status, OpenAI usage, Google project token parsing, JWT payload decode, and bd CLI JSON stdout parsing. Ran extensions/tau npm run gate (typecheck, lint warnings only, tests pass).
